critical_issues.title: Smoke test can pass without confirming blob existence in storage
critical_issues.recommendation: After invocation, add an explicit Azure Blob Storage existence check and require exists=true before exiting 0.

suggestions.title: App Insights target selection is ambiguous (`[0]` component in resource group)
suggestions.recommendation: Resolve telemetry against resources tied to the deployed Function App instead of selecting the first App Insights component in the resource group.

suggestions.title: Telemetry query is too broad and may produce false positives
suggestions.recommendation: Scope smoke-test verification to the current invocation with stronger filters to avoid false positives.
